parameters.name: repo_info
parameters.description: Get info about the connected Seafile library (name, size, file count, last modified)

parameters.name: list_directory
parameters.description: List files and folders in a Seafile directory. Parameters: path (directory path, optional, default '/')

parameters.name: get_file_detail
parameters.description: Get metadata for a file (size, last modified, type). Parameters: path (file path, required, e.g. /docs/readme.md)

parameters.name: download_file
parameters.description: Get a file download link or read text file content inline. For text files (.txt, .md, .json, .csv, etc.) returns content directly. For binary files returns a download URL. Parameters: path (file path, required)

parameters.name: create_file
parameters.description: Create a text file in Seafile (overwrites if it already exists). Parameters: path (full file path including filename, required, e.g. /notes/todo.md), content (file content, required)

value.replace: ={{ $fromAI('replace', 'Set to true to overwrite existing file (optional)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: delete_file
parameters.description: Delete a file or directory. Parameters: path (file/folder path, required), is_dir ('true' if deleting a directory, optional)

value.is_dir: ={{ $fromAI('is_dir', 'Set to true if deleting a directory (optional)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: file_operation
parameters.description: Rename, move, or copy a file. Parameters: path (source file path, required), operation ('rename', 'move', or 'copy', required). For rename: newname (new filename, required). For move/copy: dst_dir (destination directory path, required)
